name: Block Known Scammer Addresses
description: Blocks transactions involving addresses tagged as scammers by Helius

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Transaction involves known scammer address

name: Block Known Hacker Addresses
description: Blocks transactions involving addresses tagged as hackers

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Transaction involves known hacker address

name: Block Known Exploiter Addresses
description: Blocks transactions involving addresses tagged as exploiters

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Transaction involves known exploiter address

name: Block Rug Pull Addresses
description: Blocks transactions involving addresses linked to rug pulls

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Transaction involves address linked to rug pull

name: Alert on Spam Addresses
description: Alerts when transaction involves spam token creators

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Transaction involves spam token creator

name: Warn if Signer Wallet is Flagged
description: Alerts if your wallet is tagged as compromised

rule.message: 🚨 ALERT: Your wallet is flagged as potentially compromised! Check for leaked keys.

name: Block All Known Malicious Categories
description: Comprehensive block for all malicious address types

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Transaction involves known malicious address
